evidence.finding: The pinned repository contains metadata and download/cropping scripts but no explicit license file or per-artifact rights statement.
The paper establishes the corpus composition and professional weekly-podcast domain; the paper license does not establish rights to redistribute or derive clips from the source audio and transcripts.

blockers: Identify source-specific terms or obtain explicit permission for the exact audio and transcript.
Confirm that cropping and local benchmark use are permitted.
Select complete episodes and prove that their source groups do not overlap development data.
notes: Do not run the repository downloader while this review is blocked.
A later accepted review must be source-group scoped; candidate-level acceptance is insufficient.
